identity: Elven female demon hunter, long snow-white hair pulled back, a black cloth blindfold covering the eyes, sharp jawline, pale skin with faint black demon-hunter tattoos on the arms and temples, athletic toned build, pointed elf ears.
outfit: Crimson-and-black leather harness across bare midriff, black leather pants with crimson straps, armored greaves. Twin horns or curved spikes rising from a crimson headband. A tattered black cloak trailing from the shoulders.
weapons: Twin warglaives (curved double-bladed melee weapons) held one in each hand.
attackStyle: East-facing. Mid-leap, both warglaives swung forward in a scissoring slash, cloak trailing behind. Blindfolded head forward.
spellStyle: East-facing. Warglaives held down at sides, crimson demonic wings unfurling from the back in a flash.
blockStyle: East-facing. Warglaives crossed in front of the face in an X, blades outward. Crouched low.
koStyle: East-facing, fallen forward on one knee, one warglaive fallen beside her, blindfold still on. Cloak pooled around.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), predatory idle. Warglaives held at her sides, blindfolded face forward, horn-headband visible. Tattoos on arms.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Black blindfold, snow-white hair pulled back, horned headband, tattooed temples, crimson-and-black harness.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Elven female demon hunter, long snow-white hair pulled back, a black cloth blindfold covering the eyes, sharp jawline, pale skin with faint black demon-hunter tattoos on the arms and temples, athletic toned build, pointed elf ears.

OUTFIT: Crimson-and-black leather harness across bare midriff, black leather pants with crimson straps, armored greaves. Twin horns or curved spikes rising from a crimson headband. A tattered black cloak trailing from the shoulders.

WEAPONS: Twin warglaives (curved double-bladed melee weapons) held one in each hand.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible. Character occupies ~70% of the canvas height. Feet aligned near the bottom; headroom above.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.

portrait.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Elven female demon hunter, long snow-white hair pulled back, a black cloth blindfold covering the eyes, sharp jawline, pale skin with faint black demon-hunter tattoos on the arms and temples, athletic toned build, pointed elf ears.

OUTFIT: Crimson-and-black leather harness across bare midriff, black leather pants with crimson straps, armored greaves. Twin horns or curved spikes rising from a crimson headband. A tattered black cloak trailing from the shoulders.

WEAPONS: Twin warglaives (curved double-bladed melee weapons) held one in each hand.

POSE (portrait): Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Black blindfold, snow-white hair pulled back, horned headband, tattooed temples, crimson-and-black harness.

FRAMING: bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view, centered in a 256x256 canvas, shoulders fill the lower third.

SCALE (non-negotiable): character must occupy approximately 180px of the 256px canvas height — roughly 70%. Do NOT stretch or upscale. Extra space above head and/or below feet is correct.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text. Match the palette and style of the reference sheet.

NEGATIVE: do not add weapons or props not listed in WEAPONS. Do not change palette, species, or outfit from the reference sheet. Do not zoom in — respect SCALE.
